User.title: UserProfile
User.description: User account information, including verified state, UPI handle, and linked banks or balances

name.description: Display name of the UPI user

upiId.description: Unique virtual payment address, e.g. name@amitcash

activeBankId.description: Currently active linked bank account source

balance.description: Starting balance of 50 for the digital wallet

Transaction.title: TransactionRecord
Transaction.description: Records representing UPI transfers, payments, debits, or credits

refNo.description: Digital reference index generated by NPCI

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles with their starting wallet balance

/transactions/{transactionId}.description: Stores security records of UPI transactions
